sampleRecords.event_description: Caught in running equipment or machinery during regular operation
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was installing a turret wheel on a tablet machine. When the employee was moving the machine into position, it activated and a punch came down on his right ring finger. The fingernail was partially removed, with no loss of bone.

sampleRecords.event_description: Caught in running equipment or machinery during maintenance, cleaning
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was cleaning parts of a pill-making press. The employee's right hand was caught between movable machine parts, and part of the middle fingertip was amputated.

sampleRecords.event_description: Other fall to lower level, unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: On February 11, 2017, at about 6:15 PM, an employee was descending stairs with trash bags in both hands when he slipped and fell. He struck the back of his head and neck and was hospitalized.
